$job..write: !newData.exists() || (newData.hasChildren(['placeId', 'jobId', 'status', 'createdAt', 'updatedAt']) && newData.child('placeId').isNumber() && newData.child('jobId').isString() && newData.child('status').isString() && (newData.child('status').val() == 'spawned' || newData.child('status').val() == 'claimed' || newData.child('status').val() == 'resolving' || newData.child('status').val() == 'killed' || newData.child('status').val() == 'failed' || newData.child('status').val() == 'expired' || newData.child('status').val() == 'missing') && newData.child('createdAt').isNumber() && newData.child('updatedAt').isNumber())
